testcase.name: test_hero_slide_button_fields_persist
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_collections_hero.py:119: in test_hero_slide_button_fields_persist assert put.status_code == 200, f"PUT hero-slides failed: {put.status_code} {put.text}" E AssertionError: PUT hero-slides failed: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","slides"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"hero_slides":[{"image":"https://test.com/image1.jpg","alt":"Test 1","show_button":true,"button_text":"TEST_BUTTON","button_link_type":"collection","button_link":"/products?collection=summer_collection","button_product_id":null,"button_collection_slug":"summer_collection"}]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
